title: Courts must not suspect every development project of having environmental concerns: CJI Surya Kant
description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant on Saturday remarked that courts cannot afford to view every developmental project as suspect due to environmental concerns.Such a stance will impede legitimate developmental aspirations of the country, he opined.CJI Kant was speaking at the Punjab and Haryana High Court before inaugurating a refurbished library in honour of Justice Kuldip Singh, a former Supreme Court judge, who came to be known a India's green judge for his seminal judgments on environme
